trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'success'
if_action: Mark run 'success'; emit 'workflow_ok' event; release concurrency lock
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'failure'
if_action: Mark run 'failure'; capture first failed step; if recoverable, re-run with retry logic
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'cancelled'
if_action: Mark run 'cancelled'; emit 'workflow_cancelled' event; log cancellation reason
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.run_attempt == 1 AND workflow.conclusion == 'failure'
if_action: Re-run the failed jobs (workflow_dispatch with same inputs) and wait for success
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.run_attempt > 1 AND workflow.conclusion == 'success' (retry succeeded)
if_action: Re-run with debug logging enabled (ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG=true) for next attempt
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'push' AND workflow.actor is the GITHUB_TOKEN (no recursive run)
if_action: Inspect 'always()' step - it ran and completed (good)
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'pull_request' AND sender is from a fork
if_action: If 'always()' is set on a step, do NOT mark as cancelled (per docs)
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'merge_group' (merge queue)
if_action: Force-cancel the in-flight run via API (use 'force-cancel-a-workflow-run')
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'workflow_dispatch' AND inputs valid
if_action: Cancel via UI / API; wait 5 min for graceful; if still running, force-kill
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'repository_dispatch' AND client_payload valid JSON
if_action: Wait for 360-min default timeout, do not pre-empt
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.event == 'schedule' AND cron expression valid
if_action: Increase job-level timeout-minutes (e.g. 30 -> 60); re-trigger
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow.elapsed_seconds > 21600 (360-min default timeout)
if_action: Increase step-level timeout-minutes; re-trigger
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job.elapsed_seconds > job.timeout_minutes * 60
if_action: Disable fail-fast: set strategy.fail-fast: false; let all legs finish
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step.elapsed_seconds > step.timeout_minutes * 60
if_action: Quarantine the failing leg with continue-on-error; let others complete
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: matrix.fail_fast == true AND one leg failed (others cancelled)
if_action: Mark the matrix job 'failure' but allow report to continue (matrix_fail = true)
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: matrix.fail_fast == false AND one leg failed (others continued)
if_action: Re-run just the failed leg (matrix index) using gh run rerun --failed
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step.if == 'always()' AND workflow is being cancelled
if_action: Validate workflow file with 'act' locally before pushing
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job.needs includes a job that was skipped (step result = 'skipped')
if_action: Pin action to SHA instead of tag (supply chain hardening)
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step.continue_on_error == true AND step exit_code != 0
if_action: Switch deprecated node20 -> node24; re-run
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step uses needs: [other] AND other.conclusion == 'failure'
if_action: Use auth token (ghcr.io / private registry) for Docker container action
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file has valid YAML (parseable)
if_action: Cache dependencies (actions/cache) to avoid re-installs
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file references an action tag that exists (e.g. actions/checkout@v4)
if_action: Trigger a self-hosted runner by ensuring label matches and runner is online
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file references a private action in another repo (no auth = 403)
if_action: Use continue-on-error on flaky test step; track separately
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file uses an unknown event name (warning, not error)
if_action: Tag the release (signed) to trigger downstream release workflows
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: self-hosted runner with matching label is online
if_action: Bump resourceClass to larger runner for memory/CPU heavy jobs
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: self-hosted runner with matching label is offline (job queued)
if_action: Move heavy work from job to background step (saves minutes)
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: Actions minutes used < plan quota (free 2000, pro 3000, etc.)
if_action: Skip this workflow run (no-op); notify operator
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file uses permissions: read-all at workflow level
if_action: Approve required review (if user has permission) and continue
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file uses permissions: write-all at job level (overkill)
if_action: Mark run 'success'; emit 'workflow_ok' event; release concurrency lock
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step has if: failure() AND previous step failed
if_action: Mark run 'failure'; capture first failed step; if recoverable, re-run with retry logic
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step has if: success() AND previous step succeeded
if_action: Mark run 'cancelled'; emit 'workflow_cancelled' event; log cancellation reason
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: step has if: cancelled() AND workflow was cancelled
if_action: Re-run the failed jobs (workflow_dispatch with same inputs) and wait for success
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: composite action's action.yml is at .github/actions/<name>/action.yml
if_action: Re-run with debug logging enabled (ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG=true) for next attempt
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: JavaScript action uses node20 runtime (deprecated soon)
if_action: Inspect 'always()' step - it ran and completed (good)
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: JavaScript action uses node24 runtime (current)
if_action: If 'always()' is set on a step, do NOT mark as cancelled (per docs)
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: Docker container action image is on ghcr.io (auth via GITHUB_TOKEN)
if_action: Force-cancel the in-flight run via API (use 'force-cancel-a-workflow-run')
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: Docker container action image is on Docker Hub (no auth for public)
if_action: Cancel via UI / API; wait 5 min for graceful; if still running, force-kill
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: Docker container action image is on private registry (auth required)
if_action: Wait for 360-min default timeout, do not pre-empt
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file has a syntax error (status: 'expected mapping')
if_action: Increase job-level timeout-minutes (e.g. 30 -> 60); re-trigger
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file uses deprecated workflow commands (::set-output)
if_action: Increase step-level timeout-minutes; re-trigger
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: workflow file uses deprecated save-state / set-env
if_action: Disable fail-fast: set strategy.fail-fast: false; let all legs finish
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: runner has sufficient disk / memory for job (resourceClass sized)
if_action: Quarantine the failing leg with continue-on-error; let others complete
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job uses services: (postgres, redis) - container started
if_action: Mark the matrix job 'failure' but allow report to continue (matrix_fail = true)
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job uses services: AND service image pull fails
if_action: Re-run just the failed leg (matrix index) using gh run rerun --failed
else_action: Disable the workflow temporarily (move to .github/workflows-disabled/)

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job has continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.experimental }} AND matrix value undefined
if_action: Validate workflow file with 'act' locally before pushing
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job has strategy.matrix.exclude that drops all combinations (nothing runs)
if_action: Pin action to SHA instead of tag (supply chain hardening)
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A workflow run is triggered (push, PR, schedule, dispatch)
condition: job has env: passed at job vs step level (step overrides job)
if_action: Switch deprecated node20 -> node24; re-run
else_action: Do not auto-retry on unknown failure; require operator decision

trigger: A scheduled workflow fires (cron)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'success'
if_action: Mark run 'failure'; capture first failed step; if recoverable, re-run with retry logic
else_action: Page on-call; capture run URL; halt dependent workflows; require human triage

trigger: A scheduled workflow fires (cron)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'failure'
if_action: Mark run 'cancelled'; emit 'workflow_cancelled' event; log cancellation reason
else_action: Capture full log + first failed step; require sign-off before re-run

trigger: A scheduled workflow fires (cron)
condition: workflow.conclusion == 'cancelled'
if_action: Re-run the failed jobs (workflow_dispatch with same inputs) and wait for success

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secrets.MY_SECRET exists at repo level
if_action: Read secret via ${{ secrets.MY_SECRET }}; pass to action / env
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to set missing secret

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secrets.MY_SECRET exists at org level with selected repos policy
if_action: Use GITHUB_TOKEN automatically (no config needed)
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to re-auth (PAT expired, etc.)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secrets.MY_SECRET exists at environment level with required reviewers
if_action: Pass GITHUB_TOKEN to action via 'with: token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}'
else_action: Refuse to log secret values; alert on secret-leak pattern in logs

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN exists in every job (auto-injected)
if_action: Use OIDC: request token from cloud, no long-lived secret needed
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to set missing secret

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: workflow.triggered_from_fork == true (secrets NOT passed, except GITHUB_TOKEN as read-only)
if_action: Configure OIDC trust on cloud provider (AWS IAM, GCP WIF, Azure federated)
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to re-auth (PAT expired, etc.)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: env.MY_SECRET (non-secret env var) is at repo/org/environment level
if_action: Set permissions: read-all at workflow top (least privilege)
else_action: Refuse to log secret values; alert on secret-leak pattern in logs

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: required_reviewer is online AND approves the environment deploy
if_action: Set permissions: write-all only on jobs that need it (specific scope)
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to set missing secret

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: required_reviewer is offline (job blocked on approval)
if_action: Set permissions: id-token: write for OIDC job; write for protected-branches job
else_action: Block workflow; require operator to re-auth (PAT expired, etc.)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: permissions block sets GITHUB_TOKEN scope to contents: read

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: permissions block sets GITHUB_TOKEN scope to id-token: write (OIDC)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: permissions block omits a needed scope (workflow job fails with 403 on API call)

else_action: Block workflow; require operator to re-auth (PAT expired, etc.)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secret value accidentally logged to stdout (redaction kicks in)

else_action: Refuse to log secret values; alert on secret-leak pattern in logs

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: secret value accidentally logged via 'set-output' (deprecated, leaked)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: OIDC trust policy matches repo + branch + workflow path
if_action: Switch to OIDC + federated identity; remove long-lived cloud secret

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: OIDC token audience (aud) matches cloud provider requirement

else_action: Block workflow; require operator to set missing secret

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: GITHUB_TOKEN is read-only on PR from public fork (regardless of permissions block)

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET

trigger: A workflow tries to read secrets.MY_SECRET
condition: GITHUB_TOKEN expires mid-job on self-hosted > 24h (use PAT instead)
if_action: For GITHUB_TOKEN push that doesn't recurse: this is expected, no action

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated
condition: request.authentication == null (unauthenticated, 60 req/h per IP)

else_action: Halt all API activity for this token; require operator review

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated
condition: request.authentication == classic PAT (5000 req/h per user)

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated
condition: request.authentication == fine-grained PAT (with expiry, scoped perms)

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated
condition: request.method in ['POST','PATCH','PUT','DELETE'] (5 points, secondary counts)

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated

trigger: Agent calls GET /repos/{owner}/{repo} unauthenticated

else_action: Page on-call; do not auto-merge Dependabot PRs blindly

trigger: Dependabot alert raised for vulnerable dependency
condition: schedule.interval: weekly (default), daily, monthly

else_action: Surface 'cannot update' error; require operator to review graph conflict

trigger: Dependabot alert raised for vulnerable dependency
condition: @dependabot recreate comment rebuilds the group

else_action: Page on-call; do not auto-merge Dependabot PRs blindly

trigger: Dependabot alert raised for vulnerable dependency
condition: @dependabot rebase comment rebases the PR

else_action: Surface 'cannot update' error; require operator to review graph conflict

trigger: Dependabot alert raised for vulnerable dependency
condition: @dependabot merge comment merges if all checks pass

else_action: Page on-call; do not auto-merge Dependabot PRs blindly
